## V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE — Production Readiness

| Aspect | Status |
|---|---|
| **Watcher deployment** | ✅ Done — `V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER = "bear"` added to `v14_enhanced_watcher.py` |
| **Gym validation** | ✅ 67/67 PASS |
| **Confidence** | 8/10 |
| **Real-fills** | N/A (watcher-only, no OP-16 anchor impact per leaderboard) |
| **Walk-forward** | N/A (watcher-only) |
| **OP-21 gate** | WR ≥ 55% sustained over N≥100 new bear-only observations |
| **Engine change required** | **No** — watcher-only, heartbeat.md unaffected |
| **Blocker** | **J RATIFICATION per Rule 9** |

**Path to production:** J ratifies the watcher-only change. No engine code changes needed. Once ratified, bear-only observations accumulate toward OP-21 gate (N≥100, WR≥55%).

## ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE — Production Readiness

| Aspect | Status |
|---|---|
| **Watcher deployment** | ✅ Done — gate registered in watcher |
| **Gym validation** | ✅ 70/70 PASS (incl. benchmark) |
| **Walk-forward** | ✅ PASS — OOS/IS=0.667 (gate ≥0.50), IS N=63 WR=76.2%, OOS N=80 WR=97.5% |
| **Real-fills** | ✅ PASS — N=22 OPRA cases, WR=81.8% |
| **Confidence** | 9/10 |
| **Engine change required** | **Yes** — heartbeat.md must compute `or_range` at 09:35-09:45 ET and pass to watcher gate |
| **Blocker** | **J RATIFICATION (Rule 9) + ENGINE FEATURE-ADD** |

**Path to production:**
1. J ratifies ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE per Rule 9
2. Engineer adds OR-range computation to heartbeat.md
3. Production deployment

## Summary

| Category | Count | Candidates |
|---|---|---|
| **Blocked by J ratification only** | 1 | V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE |
| **Blocked by J ratification + engine change** | 1 | ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE |
| **Needs more data** | 5 | LIVE_PRICE_FIRST_BAR_TRIGGER, ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER, BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE, VISION_CHART_OBSERVER, (RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL_WATCHER borderline) |
| **Watch-only** | 2 | F11_REVERSAL_DAY_BYPASS, NAMED_LEVEL_WICK_BOUNCE_BULL |
| **Rejected** | 2 | BEARISH_SWEEP_BLOCKER, F8_VIX_FLAT_UNBLOCK |

**Immediate production path:** V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE is the fastest path — watcher-only, no engine changes, needs only J ratification. ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE has the highest confidence (9/10) and full validation but requires an engine feature-add before production.
